name: Northern Tiwa

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of Taos Northern Tiwa (nort1550).

notes: Skeleton. Kiowa-Tanoan (Tiwa) language of Taos Pueblo, New Mexico, in a practical Roman orthography. Aspirated stops (ph th kh), ejectives written with a following apostrophe, kw=[kʷ] and the affricates ts/ch are mapped. Taos has a rich system of lexical tone and vowel nasalization that this orthography marks incompletely; tone and nasalization are left unencoded, giving a high PER floor.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: Taos Northern Tiwa (nort1550)
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
sources.notes: Classification reference for a skeleton-tier entry.
